title: Dua Associates makes seven new Partners
description: Dua Associates has announced their promotions for 2026, elevating seven Principal Associates to Non-Equity Partners, as well as 19 Associate level promotions.The following lawyers have been elevated to Partnership:Kunal Ketan ParekhRaghavendra Ross DivakarMohit SharmaShreema SarkarKapil SaxenaBhaskar MishraLisha K TAdditionally, the Firm has designated as ten new Principal Associates and nine new Senior Associates.The promotees are based across Dua Associates’ eight offices and will continue to
